decision: All 17 docs/adr/ files migrated to .cleo/adrs/ (canonical location per T1824 epic owner directive). No filename collisions found — all files migrated as-is. The docs/adr/ directory archived with ARCHIVED.md marker. Legacy 56 .cleo/adrs/ files kept as-is per T1824 backfill decision.
legacyDecision: The 56 existing .cleo/adrs/ files (ADR-003 through ADR-070) are kept as-is. No DB-only migration at this stage (T1824-5 backfill task handles that separately).
